---
title: "Econ Notes"
---

A companion site to the [Econschool](https://econschool.in) videos — full derivations, exercises, and reproducible figures for microeconomics.

## Modules

- [Consumer Theory](consumer-theory/index.qmd)

## About

These notes are written for students preparing for postgraduate study in economics. The emphasis is on full mathematical working — no skipped algebra, no hand-waved geometry. Figures are generated from code so they can be reproduced and adapted.

Author: [Amit Goyal](https://econschool.in) · <amit@econschool.in>
